data.title: Codenotary receives U.S. patent for cryptographic proof technology, enhancing data integrity verification for enterprise.
data.description: In Houston, Codenotary, a prominent company in software supply chain protection, has recently secured a patent for a method to validate data integrity on a large scale. This innovative technique enhances the speed and effectiveness of confirming data integrity for enterprises. It serves as the basis for the company's software supply chain protection offerings. Businesses can now efficiently authenticate their software, build artifacts, and confidential information on a broader scale.

data.title: AI company Flip raises $20M for enterprise vertical AI, handling 300M+ customer service calls, Co-led by Next Coast and Ridge Ventures.
data.description: A $20 million Series A funding round was announced today by Flip, an AI solution specializing in automating customer service calls for enterprise brands. The funding was co-led by Next Coast Ventures and Ridge Ventures, highlighting Flip's leading position in the customer experience market. The technology has successfully managed over 300 million calls for numerous brands. This investment comes at a pivotal moment for the enterprise AI market, with significant growth and billions of dollars being invested in the sector.

data.title: 500 Global and Creators HQ launch Creators Ventures Accelerator program, supporting creator-led startups valued at US$130M+. 1,100 applications received.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, 500 Global and Creators HQ have partnered to launch the Creators Ventures Accelerator program, the first of its kind in the region. 500 Global, a renowned Silicon Valley venture capital firm, and Creators HQ, a hub supporting content creators, revealed that the program aims to nurture and assist creator-led startups. These startups, with a combined value exceeding US$130 million, have received an overwhelming response, garnering over 1,100 applications from content creators and tech innovators.

data.title: Lightbits Labs sees record growth with NVMe over TCP, closing 2025 with increased adoption in financial services, e-commerce, neo-clouds.
data.description: In San Jose, California, Lightbits Labs reported significant growth in their NVMe over TCP storage protocol with increasing customer adoption in various industries. The company ended 2025 with notable progress particularly in financial services, e-commerce, neo-clouds, and cloud service providers. Enterprises are increasingly turning to software-defined, NVMe over TCP-based storage solutions to update their data platforms due to the performance constraints and escalating expenses associated with traditional SAN infrastructure.

data.title: LOGIX FIBER NETWORKS™ honored with Trailblazer Award for 40+ years supporting Texas digital economy.
data.description: In Dallas on January 13, 2026, Data Center Reviews honored LOGIX FIBER NETWORKS™ with the Trailblazer Award for its over 40 years of dedicated fiber infrastructure supporting Texas's digital economy. This award celebrates companies that have been pivotal in this sector.

data.title: Sunoco LP and SunocoCorp LLC to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 17, 2026. Conference call at 9 am CT/10 am ET. Visit SUN's website for webcast access.
data.description: Dallas-based companies, Sunoco LP (NYSE: SUN) and SunocoCorp LLC (NYSE: SUNC), are set to report their financial and operating performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The results will be disclosed before the market opens on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. A conference call will be held on the same day at 9:00 a.m. CT (10:00 a.m. ET) where management will provide insights on the results. Those interested can tune in to a live webcast of the call on Sunoco LP's website.

data.title: Jeffersonville Bancorp declares special dividend of $0.25 per share, to be paid on Feb 6, 2026, to stockholders of record by Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: Jeffersonville Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQB - JFBC) based in Jeffersonville, N.Y., declared a special cash dividend of $0.25 per share on their common stock at their January 13, 2026 Board of Directors meeting. The dividend will be paid on February 6, 2026, to stockholders of record as of January 29, 2026.

data.title: Blackhawk wins contract to supply German armed forces with Bundeswehr Holster Carry System. #military #security #Germany
data.description: In Chesapeake, Virginia, Blackhawk revealed that it has secured a significant contract to provide the Bundeswehr Holster Carry System for the German military.

data.title: Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET) to report Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 17, 2026 and hold conference call at 8am CST.
data.description: Energy Transfer LP, a publicly traded company (NYSE: ET), is set to disclose its earnings for the fourth quarter and full year 2025 on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, prior to the market opening. Alongside this release, a conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:00 am Central Time/9:00 am Eastern Time to deliberate on the quarterly outcomes and offer a business update. For those interested, the call will be streamed live through an internet webcast available on Energy Transfer's website.

data.title: Polygon Labs acquires Coinme and Sequence for $250M+ to expand into U.S. licensed stablecoin payments, boosting $2T onchain volume and $1B offchain sales.
data.description: Polygon Labs has recently finalized deals to acquire Coinme, enhancing its onchain volume to over $2 trillion and expanding its fiat coverage significantly. This acquisition also adds over $1 billion in offchain sales to Polygon's portfolio. Additionally, Polygon Labs will now have access to battle-tested wallet and cross-chain infrastructure. The agreements were confirmed on January 13, 2026, in New York.

data.title: Rawlings® releasing book 'The Finest in the Field®: a History of Baseball Through 50 Iconic Gloves' on March 24. #BaseballEvolution
data.description: Discover the compelling book "The Finest in the Field®: a History of Baseball Through 50 Iconic Gloves" set to be released on March 24th. This exciting publication delves into the evolution of baseball through timeless gloves. Hailing from ST. LOUIS, it comes from Rawlings®, a renowned entity in the baseball realm. As the top baseball brand globally, Rawlings® holds the prestigious title of the official glove of Major League Baseball®. The book promises to captivate readers with insights into the game's history via 50 iconic gloves. Mark your calendars for the March 24th release date and get ready to embark on a journey through the storied world of baseball.

data.title: Flowspace promotes Frank Garcia to COO to boost fulfillment for midmarket and enterprise brands in Costa Mesa, California.
data.description: A Californian company, Flowspace, specializing in fulfillment services for midmarket and enterprise brands, revealed the promotion of Frank Garcia as their new chief operating officer.

data.title: National New Markets Fund (NNMF) secures $95M in New Market Tax Credits, its 15th award; largest allocation in program's history.
data.description: In Los Angeles, National New Markets Fund (NNMF), a subsidiary of SDS Capital Group, has received a significant boost with a $95 million allocation of New Market Tax Credits (NMTC) from the U.S. Treasury's Community Development Financial Institutions (CDFI) Fund. This allocation comes as part of the CDFI's record-breaking $10 billion funding round for 2024-2025, the largest in the program's history. Established in 2006 by SDS Capital Group, NNMF aims to drive impactful investments into communities.
